title: ONLINE FARM HEALTH TEAM MEETING USING PAINT 3D AND GOOGLE MAPS TO IMPROVE FARM ZONING
description: A factsheet outlining a method for farm health teams to collaboratively improve on-farm zoning using online meetings with Microsoft Paint 3D and Google Maps. It provides step-by-step guidance to define biosecurity zones, mark key elements and routes, and develop a SMART action plan to mitigate disease introduction risks.
